article_title: 重新设计 System.Diagnostics.Process：用类型系统消除
core_theme: Process 类的 StandardOutput 等属性只在你自己调了 Start 之后才有效，这是 API 设计缺陷；解法是把这些成员移到 Start 的返回类型里，让编译器替你挡住非法访问
reader_takeaway: 理解一个 API 设计原则：如果属性或方法只在某个条件下有效，就把它移到只有满足条件才能拿到的类型上
summary_angle: 用类型系统的分层替代运行时异常——一个 Process 类的假想重构

information_blocks.source_anchor: Process.StandardOutput 只在你自己调了 Start 的 Process 对象上有效，是一个 attractive nuisance
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一个锁住的属性符号，代表运行时才爆的非法访问

information_blocks.source_anchor: 把标准句柄移到 ProcessStartResult，Start 返回这个类型而不是 Process
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一条分离线，左侧旧的混合结构，右侧拆分成两个清晰的类型

information_blocks.source_anchor: 要强制开发者按顺序做事，就让第二步依赖第一步产出的东西
information_blocks.visual_idea: 一把钥匙打开一个门，门后是标准句柄

main_metaphor: 一把钥匙（Start 的返回值）才能打开的门（标准句柄）
primary_subject: 一个抽象的门和钥匙结构，门后是受保护的属性
subject_action: 钥匙正在从锁里转开，门缝露出安全的访问路径
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: watercolor comic illustration, translucent washes, visible paper texture, soft edges, light ink structure
selected_style_reason: 从 40 项风格池中随机选中
style_safety_note: 该风格不指向任何品牌、工作室或艺术家，无需安全改写
draft_goal: 验证 before-after 对照构图 + 水彩漫画风格是否成立
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Conceptual editorial illustration in a watercolor comic style with translucent washes, visible paper texture, soft edges, and light ink structure. Left-right split composition: on the left, a tangled knot of overlapping shapes in muted red tones representing a confused API where properties are mixed together unsafely, with a small Chinese label '陷阱' on a warning chip; on the right, the same shapes cleanly separated into two distinct groups connected by a key-and-lock mechanism, with a small Chinese label '拆分'. A decorative key shape bridges the center, suggesting that calling Start produces the key that unlocks safe access. Warm amber and cool slate blue palette on a cream paper-textured background. Soft watercolor bleeds between sections. No poster title, no English slogan, no fake UI, no fake terminal, no fake code editor, no watermark, no robot figure.
